title: shorea stellata
intro: Shorea stellata, also known as the Star Cumaru, is a tropical tree species native to the rainforests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and resin, which contain flavonoids and terpenoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Shorea stellata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and prevent the growth of certain types of bacteria and fungi. Shorea stellata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, infusion, and oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
